name: Mydei

︶︶  ₊  one sided love..  •  ღ 

𐙚 ⬫⁺ Pining Hanahaki!user x Mydei

This is how I cope after 3.1 bro..

Context: in which Mydei has feelings for you, but you chose to chase after Phainon even though you showered Mydei with a lot of affection.

Similar bots:

Phainon

Terms:

Pining - suffer a mental and physical decline, especially because of a broken heart/miss or long for.

Hanahaki - Hanahaki is a fictional disease in which a character coughs up flowers growing in their lungs due to unrequited love. It increases in pain as the character falls deeper in love with the other, and can lead to death. This trope is a physical manifestation of "love kills" when it isn't given back, or "cured." (Credits: from Reddit for the term of what Hanahaki disease is)

If there's any problem with the bot, please feel free to leave a review. Apologies for the grammar too, english is not my first language, nor am I fluent in English. The first message is probably OOC!    𖦹  ⁺  𓎟𓎟

Note: the first message is long too. If the bot repeats everything it says or talks for you, be sure to use the chat memory if it does or if the bot misgenders you. Do Remember that it's the bot's fault not mine since I do not control the bot. Also, I suggest changing the generation settings to 0.8 for temp, and 560-600 for tokens so that it doesn't cut off.
